_publications._publicationTitle: A comprehensive custom panel design for routine hereditary cancer testing: preserving control, improving diagnostics and revealing a complex variation landscape.

_contextSnippet: Therefore, considering the 358 known variants in the training and validation sets, the analytical sensitivity of the panel was 98.4% (96.4–99.4%) and the analytical specificity was of 100% (99–100%).
details: Analytical sensitivity of 98.4% (96.4-99.4%) and analytical specificity of 100% (99-100%) for detecting known variants in training and validation sets
